title: John Romero reacts to massive layoffs at id Software, which reportedly lost half of its team
summary: The co-creator of DOOM shows solidarity with affected workers and calls for preserving the studio's historical legacy.

title: Bethesda restructures its planning and The Elder Scrolls Online modifies its roadmap after layoffs
summary: The cuts at Xbox directly impact Bethesda's studios, which will prioritize franchises with the greatest potential.

title: IO Interactive revives Project Fantasy, closes its Istanbul studio and lays off staff after Xbox's withdrawal
summary: The Hitman studio confirms that the project is not dead, but the restructuring involves the closure of its Turkish office.

title: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma blames Phil Spencer's strategy for the layoffs and announces a new direction
summary: Microsoft acknowledges it expanded too much and plans a more focused approach on its core franchises.

title: 37-year veterans and accessibility managers among those laid off; outrage grows against the industry
summary: Reactions to the massive Xbox layoffs include criticism from Bernie Sanders, developers, and a union relief fund.

title: Obsidian Entertainment loses 25% of its staff in the wave of Xbox cuts
summary: The studio behind The Outer Worlds and Fallout: New Vegas is severely affected by Microsoft's restructuring.

title: Sony faces player boycott and petition with 170,000 signatures after removing physical discs from PlayStation
summary: Users cancel their PS Plus subscriptions in protest, while Sony breaks its silence and faces harsh criticism.

title: The Blood of Dawnwalker shapes up to be the breakout RPG of 2026 according to early press impressions
summary: The new game from the director of The Witcher 3 combines action, romance, and intrigue in an ambitious open world.

title: Xbox Game Pass fails to meet its goals: subscriber count is below 50% of Microsoft's target
summary: The $80 billion investment in the service fails to achieve expected results, forcing a strategic rethink.

title: Pokémon Champions surpasses 10 million downloads and a rumor about 300 new Pokémon divides the community
summary: The franchise also expands its presence with LEGO sets and collaborations with Japanese football teams.

title: GOG gives away a classic Daedalic adventure and Persona 4 is available for free for a limited time
summary: PC gamers can get two acclaimed titles at no cost during the next few days.

title: State of Decay 3 might not launch on Xbox Game Pass after the cuts at Undead Labs
summary: The future of the game is uncertain after Microsoft allowed the developer's departure following the massive layoffs.

title: Arc Raiders implements the most requested matchmaking system and reduces item fraud to historic lows
summary: Embark Studios' extraction game celebrates a highly requested update that improves the PvP experience.

title: Subnautica 2 receives its first major update with changes to marine creature behavior
summary: The long-awaited patch introduces the ability to stun fish and improves the fauna's artificial intelligence.

title: Captain Tsubasa 2: World Fighters showcases its game modes in a new trailer and generates great anticipation
summary: The return of the classic anime football game comes with new mechanics and nostalgic references to the original series.

title: Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader receives a massive patch on Switch 2 that includes all DLC for free
summary: Owlcat Games' RPG fixes launch issues on Nintendo's console and compensates players.

title: Nintendo Switch Online expands its catalog with four classic Game Boy and Game Boy Advance titles
summary: The Sword of Hope, Fortified Zone, Wario Land: Super Mario Land 3, and Dr. Mario & Puzzle League come to the service.

title: Orbitals announces its English voice cast with actors from Street Fighter and Fire Emblem
summary: The promising cooperative action game with anime style reveals its voice cast and shows its opening cinematic.

title: Xbox Game Pass reveals free games for early July 2026, including Tony Hawk and Palworld 1.0
summary: Ten new titles arrive on the subscription service, while as many are set to leave the catalog.

title: Artists like Yoshitaka Amano and studio directors warn about the dangers of AI in video game creation
summary: The Final Fantasy artist and the director of Expedition 33 express their concern about the future of human creativity in the face of artificial intelligence.
